title: Hiring Production Engineer at Siemens India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at Siemens India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Siemens India Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Kanpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Siemens India Ventures Solutions:
Siemens India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India Ventures Solutions!
